subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned unto God, the Lord of the worlds, and hath attained His presence, and hearkened unto His call, and beheld [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الله رب العالمین و فاز بلقائه و سمع ندآئه و رای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
